backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all core types (Trip, UserProfile, PricingConfig, roles, etc.) and backend logic for a ride-hailing app with admin, driver, and customer roles. Includes access control, trip management, and pricing configuration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two features: replacing JavaScript 'in' operator checks on trip fields with safe string comparisons, and ensuring all trip data passes through normalizeTrip() before rendering in driver-facing components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, etc.) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app titled 'Namma Driver Pilot' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes, renders the AppShell layout with navigation, and conditionally shows the ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AdminTripsTab.ts: Admin trips management tab that fetches all trips via useGetAllTripsAdmin, displays them in a searchable table with status badges, and formats location, fare, and timestamp fields using NormalizedTrip types.
frontend/src/components/AdminUsersTab.ts: Displays a searchable, filterable table of all users with their name, email, role badge, and join date for the admin panel.
frontend/src/components/AuthGate.tsx: Wraps protected routes and redirects unauthenticated users to /login after waiting up to 5 seconds for Internet Identity to resolve, showing a spinner in the meantime.
frontend/src/components/AvailableTripsSe: Shows a scrollable list of available trips for drivers to accept, with pickup/dropoff details, vehicle type, and an accept button that calls the acceptTrip mutation.
frontend/src/components/CustomerTripList: Renders a scrollable list of a customer's trips with status badges, pickup/dropoff locations, vehicle type, and timestamps.
frontend/src/components/DataLoadErrorBan: Displays a dismissible error banner with a refresh button when data fails to load.
frontend/src/components/DriverProfileSec: Shows a driver's profile card including duty status, service area, vehicle experience, transmission comfort, and languages, with an edit button.
frontend/src/components/DriverTripList.t: Fetches and displays a driver's assigned trips in a scrollable list, with a complete-trip button for accepted trips and fare display.
frontend/src/components/EditDriverProfil: A form component for editing a driver's profile, including service area, vehicle experience, transmission comfort, availability, and languages, with save functionality via the upsertDriverProfile mutation.
A dialog modal wrapper around EditDriverProfileForm that normalizes the profile data before passing it to the form.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: A React class-based error boundary that catches render errors and displays a fallback UI with retry and reset (clear storage) options.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: A page layout component that wraps content with a sticky Navigation header and a footer crediting caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: A sticky top navigation bar showing the app logo, backend health status (dev only), user role badge, dashboard link, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/OfflineBanner.ts: A dismissible sticky banner that warns users when the backend is unreachable.
frontend/src/components/PricingTab.tsx: An admin-only tab component for viewing and editing the platform's pricing configuration, including local, outstation, vehicle multiplier, and commission settings.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A dialog modal for creating or updating a user's basic profile (name and email), handling Candid role variant encoding to avoid ICP SDK encoding errors.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to /login and renders children only when authenticated.
A form component for creating ride/trip requests that collects pickup/dropoff locations, vehicle type, trip type, and journey details, then submits via useCreateTrip hook. Includes a helper function to convert backend Trip types to the local UI Trip type.
frontend/src/components/RoleGuard.tsx: A route guard component that checks the user's role and redirects or renders NotAuthorizedPage if the role doesn't match the required allowedRole prop.
frontend/src/components/RoleSelectionWar: A modal dialog that prompts unassigned users to select either a Customer or Driver role, then navigates to the appropriate dashboard after setting the role via mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackendHealth.ts: A hook that pings the backend canister to check reachability, returning isHealthy, isChecking, and error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: A hook that fetches the currently authenticated user's profile from the backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central collection of React Query hooks for all backend interactions including role management, user/driver profiles, trip creation/fetching, and pricing config.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color themes using earth tones and warm greens.
frontend/src/lib/defaultConfig.ts: Exports a DEFAULT_CONFIG constant with fallback pricing configuration values for local, outstation, vehicle multiplier, and commission settings, used when the backend pricing config is unavailable.
frontend/src/lib/types.ts: Defines shared TypeScript types for roles, trips, vehicles, and locations, along with utility functions to normalize and display Candid variant role values returned from the backend.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying the logged-in admin's identity info, summary stats for users and trips, and tabbed sections for managing users, trips, and pricing configuration.
frontend/src/pages/AdminUpgradePage.tsx: Page that allows a user to enter a setup code to upgrade their account to the admin role, with error handling and loading state feedback.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Customer dashboard page that combines a ride request form with a trip list, merging optimistically added trips with backend-fetched trips for immediate UI feedback.
frontend/src/pages/DriverDashboard.tsx: Driver dashboard page showing the driver's profile, an edit profile modal, and tabbed views for available trips and the driver's own trips.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page that redirects authenticated users to their role-specific dashboard or to the role selection page, and unauthenticated users to the login page.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page presenting an Internet Identity sign-in button, redirecting already-authenticated users to the post-login route.
frontend/src/pages/NotAuthorizedPage.tsx: Error page displayed when a user lacks permission to access a route, with a button to navigate back to the home page.
Post-login redirect page that fetches the user's role and navigates them to the appropriate dashboard, showing a spinner while loading and an error state with retry on failure.
frontend/src/pages/RoleSelectionPage.tsx: Legacy role selection page that lets unassigned users choose between customer and driver roles, redirecting already-assigned users to their respective dashboards.
frontend/src/pages/SelectRolePage.tsx: Current role selection page where new users pick customer or driver, with role-based redirects for already-assigned users and loading/error states during mutation.
frontend/src/utils/normalizeProfile.ts: Provides utilities to normalize Candid variant array fields (vehicleExperience, transmissionComfort, languages) in a UserProfile into plain string arrays, handling all backend return shapes.
frontend/src/utils/normalizeRole.ts: Normalizes a backend role value from plain string, Candid variant object, or hash-prefixed formats into a clean lowercase string, returning an empty string as fallback.
frontend/src/utils/normalizeTrip.ts: Defines a NormalizedTrip interface and normalizeTrip function that converts raw backend Trip objects into plain-string status/type fields by extracting keys from all Candid variant forms.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/withTimeout.ts: Wraps any promise with a configurable timeout using Promise.race, rejecting with a custom TimeoutError if the timeout expires first.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), border radii, fonts, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3) for a ride-hailing app, documenting two existing fix features: removing unsafe 'in' operator checks on trip fields and ensuring all trip data is normalized via normalizeTrip() before rendering in driver frontend components.
